title: Uneasy?
description: a mod designed and carefully tweaked to make you feel uneasy
body:
A Psycological horror mod that will mess with your head and make you question your own sanity.

I recommend playing with audio on (Headphones) and playing in singleplayer. there is nothing wrong with playing in multiplayer, but the atmosphere works better alone

I will work on adding more versions, if you would like to request a version you want. comment over on the [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/uneasy) page and ill respond as soon as i see it.

--spoilers below--
## i recommend looking at this only after you have played for a bit
## 
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
# Features:
-   Delayed, amplified player footsteps: your own step sounds replay slightly late and louder to make it seem like theres someone walking behind you.
-   Above-ground cave ambience: random cave sounds can play while you are above sea level.
-   Nearby player-like sounds: hurt, fall, attack, breathing, and step sounds can play nearby.
-   Inventory preview disruption: the player model preview in the inventory can be hidden.
-   Random camera yaw nudges: the player view can shift slightly.
-   Distant black silhouette: a short-lived shadow player can appear at range and vanish when looked at directly.
-   Unseen openable blocks move: doors, fence gates, and trapdoors can open or close when outside direct view.
-   Grass decay: nearby grass blocks can turn into dirt.
-   Chest stack shuffle: items in tracked/player-placed chests can move between slots.
-   Sleep interruption: sleep can be delayed or interrupted, with forced wake-up into night.
-   Time distortion: days or nights can become 10-50% shorter or longer.

</details>
